title: Roshan D’Souza joins Saga Legal as Partner in Bengaluru
description: Roshan D’Souza has joined Saga Legal as a Partner in Bengaluru to strengthen and deepen the Firm's disputes and financial regulatory practice.D'Souza is a 2006 graduate of S.D.M. Law College, MangaloreHe has over two decades of experience in debt recovery, securitisation, insolvency, and bankruptcy law. His practice spans a wide spectrum of contentious matters, including financial disputes, insolvency, commercial litigation, regulatory proceedings, and arbitration.Having worked in-house with org
